channel.title: AI Model Tracker
channel.description: New additions to the Artificial Analysis LLM Leaderboard

item.title: New model: GPT-5.3 Codex (xhigh) from OpenAI, intel index 53.97
item.description: GPT-5.3 Codex (xhigh) is amongst the leading models in intelligence, but somewhat expensive when comparing to other models of similar price. It's also faster than average, however very verbose. The model supports text and image input, outputs text, and has a 400k tokens context window with knowledge up to August 2025.

item.title: New model: gpt-oss-120B (low) from OpenAI, intel index 24.47
item.description: gpt-oss-120B (low) is amongst the leading models in intelligence and reasonably priced when comparing to other open weight models of similar size. It's also notably fast, however somewhat verbose. The model supports text input, outputs text, and has a 131k tokens context window with knowledge up to May 2025.

item.title: New model: gpt-oss-20B (high) from OpenAI, intel index 24.47
item.description: gpt-oss-20B (high) is amongst the leading models in intelligence and reasonably priced when comparing to other open weight models of similar size. It's also notably fast, however very verbose. The model supports text input, outputs text, and has a 131k tokens context window with knowledge up to May 2024.

item.title: New model: o3 from OpenAI, intel index 38.37
item.description: o3 is above average in intelligence, but somewhat expensive when comparing to other models of similar price. It's also faster than average, however somewhat verbose. The model supports text and image input, outputs text, and has a 200k tokens context window with knowledge up to May 2024.

item.title: New model: gpt-oss-120B (high) from OpenAI, intel index 33.27
item.description: gpt-oss-120B (high) is amongst the leading models in intelligence and reasonably priced when comparing to other open weight models of similar size. It's also notably fast, however very verbose. The model supports text input, outputs text, and has a 131k tokens context window with knowledge up to May 2024.

item.title: New model: GPT-5.4 mini (xhigh) from OpenAI, intel index 48.1
item.description: GPT-5.4 mini (xhigh) is amongst the leading models in intelligence and well priced when comparing to other models of similar price. It's also notably fast, however very verbose. The model supports text and image input, outputs text, and has a 400k tokens context window with knowledge up to August 2025.

item.title: New model: gpt-oss-20B (low) from OpenAI, intel index 20.79
item.description: gpt-oss-20B (low) is amongst the leading models in intelligence and reasonably priced when comparing to other open weight models of similar size. It's also notably fast and fairly concise. The model supports text input, outputs text, and has a 131k tokens context window with knowledge up to May 2025.

item.title: New model: GPT-5.4 nano (xhigh) from OpenAI, intel index 44.39
item.description: GPT-5.4 nano (xhigh) is amongst the leading models in intelligence, but somewhat expensive when comparing to other models of similar price. It's also notably fast, however very verbose. The model supports text and image input, outputs text, and has a 400k tokens context window with knowledge up to August 2025.

item.title: New model: GPT-5.4 nano (Non-Reasoning) from OpenAI, intel index 24.36
item.description: GPT-5.4 nano (Non-Reasoning) is amongst the leading models in intelligence, but somewhat expensive when comparing to other non-reasoning models of similar price. It's also notably fast and highly concise. The model supports text and image input, outputs text, and has a 400k tokens context window with knowledge up to August 2025.

item.title: New model: GPT-5.4 nano (medium) from OpenAI, intel index 38.11
item.description: GPT-5.4 nano (medium) is amongst the leading models in intelligence, but somewhat expensive when comparing to other models of similar price. It's also notably fast, however somewhat verbose. The model supports text and image input, outputs text, and has a 400k tokens context window with knowledge up to August 2025.

item.title: New model: GPT-5.4 (Non-reasoning) from OpenAI, intel index 35.39
item.description: GPT-5.4 (Non-reasoning) is amongst the leading models in intelligence, but somewhat expensive when comparing to other non-reasoning models of similar price. It's also faster than average and fairly concise. The model supports text and image input, outputs text, and has a 1m tokens context window.

item.title: New model: GPT-5.4 (xhigh) from OpenAI, intel index 57.17
item.description: GPT-5.4 (xhigh) is amongst the leading models in intelligence, but somewhat expensive when comparing to other models of similar price. It's also faster than average, however very verbose. The model supports text and image input, outputs text, and has a 1m tokens context window with knowledge up to August 2025.

item.title: New model: GPT-5.4 mini (Non-Reasoning) from OpenAI, intel index 23.28
item.description: GPT-5.4 mini (Non-Reasoning) is above average in intelligence and reasonably priced when comparing to other non-reasoning models of similar price. It's also notably fast and fairly concise. The model supports text and image input, outputs text, and has a 400k tokens context window with knowledge up to August 2025.

item.title: New model: GPT-5.4 Pro (xhigh) from OpenAI, intel index None
item.description: GPT-5.4 Pro (xhigh) supports text and image input, outputs text, and has a 1m tokens context window with knowledge up to August 2025.

item.title: New model: GPT-5.4 mini (medium) from OpenAI, intel index 37.73
item.description: GPT-5.4 mini (medium) is above average in intelligence and well priced when comparing to other models of similar price. It's also notably fast, however somewhat verbose. The model supports text and image input, outputs text, and has a 400k tokens context window with knowledge up to August 2025.

item.title: New model: Llama 3.3 Instruct 70B from Meta, intel index 14.49
item.description: Llama 3.3 Instruct 70B is above average in intelligence, but somewhat expensive when comparing to other open weight non-reasoning models of similar size. It's also faster than average, however somewhat verbose. The model has a 128k tokens context window with knowledge up to December 2023.

item.title: New model: Llama 3.1 Instruct 405B from Meta, intel index 17.38
item.description: Llama 3.1 Instruct 405B is below average in intelligence and particularly expensive when comparing to other open weight non-reasoning models of similar size. It's also notably slow, however fairly concise. The model has a 128k tokens context window with knowledge up to December 2023.

item.title: New model: Llama 3.2 Instruct 90B (Vision) from Meta, intel index 11.90129896307905
item.description: Llama 3.2 Instruct 90B (Vision) is below average in intelligence and somewhat expensive when comparing to other open weight non-reasoning models of similar size. It's also slower than average, however fairly concise. The model supports image input, and has a 128k tokens context window with knowledge up to December 2023.

item.title: New model: Llama 3.2 Instruct 11B (Vision) from Meta, intel index 8.73
item.description: Llama 3.2 Instruct 11B (Vision) is among the least intelligent models and somewhat expensive when comparing to other open weight non-reasoning models of similar size. It's also notably slow and somewhat verbose. The model supports image input, and has a 128k tokens context window with knowledge up to December 2023.

item.title: New model: Llama 4 Maverick from Meta, intel index 18.36
item.description: Llama 4 Maverick is below average in intelligence, but reasonably priced when comparing to other open weight non-reasoning models of similar size. It's also notably fast, however somewhat verbose. The model supports text and image input, outputs text, and has a 1m tokens context window with knowledge up to August 2024.

item.title: New model: Llama 4 Scout from Meta, intel index 13.52
item.description: Llama 4 Scout is above average in intelligence and reasonably priced when comparing to other open weight non-reasoning models of similar size. It's also notably fast, however very verbose. The model supports text and image input, outputs text, and has a 10m tokens context window with knowledge up to August 2024.
